author: hitesh
raw_text: Hey guys, welcome back to the channel! Today we are talking about system design, and honestly, bro, system design is simple. People overcomplicate databases, load balancers, caching, see? You don't need to learn 50 tools, simple hai. Learn code online is about writing code. Let's write simple code. Def getData. See, if you overcomplicate this, you fail, simple. Don't write too much boilerplate code. Writing simple logic is what makes you a great engineer, guys. Bro, coding is simple. If you think too much about fancy tech stacks, you fail. Simple.
